query:
ALTER TABLE position_requisitions 
ADD COLUMN hiringPreference ENUM('open', 'family', 'internal') DEFAULT 'open',
ADD COLUMN familyRelationship VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN conflictOfInterestDisclosed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN disclosureDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN disclosureNotes TEXT DEFAULT NULL
